action.reasoning: Observation: New best balanced_accuracy=0.56 (many/medium/few: 0.782/0.591/0.281), val_acc=0.551 from clean 2-stage ResNet50 (Focal+sqrt-sampler stage1, CE+count-sampler stage2 on frozen head). Curves show good stage1 convergence to ~0.53 then stage2 lift. Analysis: Strong head but tail still limited; logit adjustment (logits -= tau * log(prior)) is lightweight LT technique that boosts few-shot using class_counts prior (tau~0.5 common); current ckpt lacks counts so must resave; minor hyp tweaks (epochs/LR) can stabilize without major rewrite. Decision: Rewrite train.py (full clean 2-stage: 40ep s1 Focal AdamW5e-4, 20ep s2 SGD0.1-mom0.9 on fc only, save class_counts in best.pt); update predict.py for tau=0.5 logit adjustment from ckpt; run training (fits time/iter budget) then submit_eval for expected bal_acc gain to ~0.57+.
